name: swing-gui-builder
description: Visual drag-and-drop GUI builder for Java Swing in VS Code

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:webview && npm run build:extension
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run verify:prd
scripts.coverage: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:webview && npm run coverage:badges
scripts.coverage:merge: shx rm -rf .nyc_output coverage/combined && shx mkdir -p .nyc_output coverage/combined && shx cp coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/extension-coverage.json && shx cp webview-app/coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/webview-coverage.json && nyc report --temp-dir .nyc_output --reporter json-summary --reporter html --report-dir coverage/combined && shx rm -rf .nyc_output
scripts.coverage:badges: shx rm -f media/coverage-badges/*.png media/coverage-badges/*.svg && npm run coverage:merge && node ./scripts/generateCoverageBadges.mjs
scripts.lint: biome check src && cd shared && npm run lint && cd ../webview-app && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src && cd shared && npm run lint:fix && cd ../webview-app && npm run lint:fix && cd ..
scripts.typecheck: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../webview-app && npm run typecheck && cd .. && tsc -p ./ --noEmit

commands.title: Swing GUI Builder: Init Project Config
